metadata.method_name: Mode-A: closure-certified composition over disjunctive LLM reads (matched-coverage showdown)

data_provenance.note: gold atomic relations read off the realization model; query DEDUCTION-REQUIRED

rcc8.pc_completeness: PC-SOUND-BUT-INCOMPLETE: coverage / Mode-B collapse / resolve-to-singleton are SOUND LOWER BOUNDS (true minimal network may resolve MORE). Every singleton Mode-A commits is still sound (contains gold when reads are sound) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0.

H3_iteration_real.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

H3_iteration_gold.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

C2_on_vs_off.note: OFF never reads the query edge locally (s,t never co-occur), so its single-relation coverage is 0; Mode-A coverage IS the deduction-required bite recovered by the composition floor.

audit.interpretation: On all-sound networks Mode-A's closed query SET must contain gold (soundness of PC) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0; silent-wrong arises ONLY from unsound reads.

decomposition.inherited_is: premise inherited from neuro-symbolic literature: a single exact composition-table step (naive single-pass) already beats LLM per-path composition (naive > PoT).
decomposition.novel_is: the contribution of THIS method: iterated PC closure (full) resolves deduction-deep queries (hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1) that a single naive pass leaves underdetermined (full > naive).
decomposition.note: decomposition selective accuracies are on the bite-bearing pool; RCC-8 full/naive resolve-correct rates are SOUND LOWER BOUNDS (PC-2 sound-but-incomplete).

reads.sentence: The embassy compound is completely separate from the riverside walk.
The embassy compound and the sports complex meet at their boundary but share no interior.
The parking precinct and the riverside walk partially overlap.
The parking precinct and the sports complex cover precisely the same region.

verdict.headline: H1 CONFIRMED on all arms (Mode-A > PoT AND > SC at matched coverage, Holm). rcc8: vs POT Δ=+0.448(sig), vs SC Δ=+0.621(sig)

cross_algebra_synthesis.finding: The closure advantage over neural per-path reasoning scales with relation-algebra richness (point 3 -> RCC-8 8 -> Allen 13 base relations): on the 3-relation convex point algebra a strong neural baseline (Path-of-Thoughts) already composes correctly, so Mode-A TIES it (gap~0) while still beating self-consistency; on the 8-relation RCC-8 spatial calculus and the 13-relation Allen interval algebra (both NP-hard consistency) neural per-path chaining degrades and Mode-A's symbolic closure opens a growing gap. RCC-8 closure numbers are SOUND LOWER BOUNDS (PC-2 is sound-but-incomplete on RCC-8).
cross_algebra_synthesis.monotonicity_note: advantage_grows_with_algebra_richness = gap_vs_pot is monotone non-decreasing across point<rcc8<allen (tol 0.0); an out-of-order RCC-8 point is reported honestly, not suppressed.

verdict.scope: REAL-LLM-READ-ON-SYNTHETIC; point=PC-complete exact arm, allen=NP-hard lower-bound generality
